why_this_action.reasoning: The execution board said no do-now handoff packet was truthful. The short-window congestion clears in 26 min but the underlying architecture keeps producing empty boards. The self-improvement mandate says: build new capability. Two concrete outputs: (1) a new SEO comparison roundup page on the Ralph Site that cross-links all 8 individual comparison pages with Codeberg-primary CTAs, (2) a dead-loop watchdog that auto-escalates when >=3 consecutive dead-loop cycles occur with the same fingerprint.
supporting_reasons: Execution board explicitly said: 'No do-now handoff packet is currently truthful in this review window'
The 6 prior architecture-repair runs share the same structural problem: all lanes blocked
Short-window congestion clears at 15:28 but the next slot would likely go to measurement_hold again
Dev.to lane bootstrap failed (login blocked) — infrastructure gap confirmed
HN/Lobsters 7+ cycles without execution — structural ceiling confirmed
Every curator/outreach lane has a live review window — no new outreach is truthful
The Ralph Site has 8 individual comparison pages but no comparison roundup — genuine SEO gap
The dead-loop watchdog is a permanent process improvement that will catch this state automatically

verification.comparison_surface_area: 8 tools across 5 dimensions on a single roundup page
